classes.reasoning: The document is explicitly titled 'FOGLIO INFORMATIVO E MODULO DI CONSENSO INFORMATO PER LA PARTECIPAZIONE DEI PAZIENTI A UN SOTTOSTUDIO FACOLTATIVO PER LA RICERCA GENETICA' (Information Sheet and Informed Consent Form for Patient Participation in an Optional Genetic Research Sub-Study). It contains the classic three-part structure of an informed consent: introduction, informative section, and consent expression section with signature blocks for patient, witness, and study physician.

trial_title: Studio di fase 2, multicentrico, in aperto su lifileucel (linfociti infiltranti il tumore [TIL]) in partecipanti con melanoma avanzato precedentemente trattato
summary: This is an informed consent form (ICF) for an optional genetic research sub-study within a Phase 2 clinical trial testing lifileucel (tumor infiltrating lymphocytes) in patients with previously treated advanced melanoma (IOV-MEL-202). The document is the Italian country-specific version requesting patient authorization for genetic testing on tumor tissue and blood samples collected during the main study.
references_to: modulo di consenso dello Studio principale
